revision.text:
[[de:Dekanlisten A2]] In Egyptology, the {{ill|Egyptology|en|Egyptology|qid=Q145903|lt=Egyptology|1=Egyptology}} designate the '''Dekanlists A2''' – those decan lists of the {{ill|Diagonal Star Clock|de|Diagonalsternuhr|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock|qid=Q142353|1=Star clock}}s that, in contrast to the {{ill|Dekanlists A1|de|Dekanlisten A1|1=A1 Decan Lists|2=de|3=Dekanlisten A1|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists A1|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists A1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists A1|13=User:Immanuelle/A1 Decan Lists|qid=Q1183634}}, begin with the {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|4=pt|5=Baktiu|lt=Decan Star|lt_ja=Dekan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=|qid=Q804527}} ''{{ill|Tepi-a Kenmet|de|Tepi-a-Kenmet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}''. The decan order A2 is attested on several coffins of the {{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qid=Q719639|lt=12th Dynasty|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}} as well as in a celestial representation in the {{ill|Osireion|en|Osireion|qid=Q2033435|lt=Osireion|1=Osireion}}. The A2 decan lists are regarded as precursors of the {{ill|Dekanlists C|de|Dekanlisten C|1=Decan List C|2=de|3=Dekanlisten C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlists C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|qid=Q1183637}}. The coffins originate from {{ill|Asyut|en|Asyut|qid=Q29962|lt=Asyut|1=Asyut}}, {{ill|Thebes, Egypt|en|Thebes, Egypt|qid=Q101583|lt=Thebes|1=Thebes, Egypt}}, {{ill|Gebelein|en|Gebelein|qid=Q1496830|lt=Gebelein|1=Gebelein}} and {{ill|Aswan|en|Aswan|qid=Q29888|lt=Aswan|1=Aswan}}. == Reconstruction of the A2 Decans == {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; border: 2px solid gray;" |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} |colspan="12" style="text-align:center; background:#FFE39B"|'''Reconstruction of the A2 Decans''' |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} ! Decan No. || {{ill|Egyptian hieroglyphs|en|Egyptian hieroglyphs|qid=Q132659|lt=Hieroglyphs|1=Egyptian hieroglyphs}} || Ancient Egyptian Name || Translation |- | style="text-align:center"| 1 | D1:D36 V31:n-t G14-N14-N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a Kenmet|de|Tepi-a-Kenmet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Tpj-ˁ-Knm.t'' | ''Head / First of {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|de|Kenmet (Dekan)|lt=Kenmet|lt_ja=Kenmet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|qid=Q1632718|1=Kenmet (Decan)}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 2 | V31:n-t G14-N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33 | {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|de|Kenmet (Dekan)|lt=Kenmet|lt_ja=Kenmet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|qid=Q1632718|1=Kenmet (Decan)}}
''Knm.t'' | ''He who delights the goddess {{ill|Mut|en|Mut|qid=Q29409|lt=Mut|1=Mut}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 3 | W12:D21-Aa1*p:D46-n:V31-t G14-N14-N33 | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|de|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|lt=Cheri-cheped-en-Kenmet|lt_ja=Cheri-cheped-en-Kenmet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|qid=Q972923|1=Cheri-cheped-Kenmut}}
''Ḫrj-ḫpd-n-Knm.t'' | ''Bearer of the rear cheek of Kenmet'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 4 | F4:t-Z1-U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Hat-djat|de|Hat-djat|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḥ3t-ḏ3t'' | ''The (at the) top'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 5 | F22-G43-Z1*Z1 U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Pehui-djat|de|Pehui-djat|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|qid=Q2067507|1=Pehui-djat}}
''Pḥ.wj-ḏ3jt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 6 | t:T13-D2:t N14-N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Temat-heret|de|Temat-heret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|qid=Q1549527|1=Temat-heret}}
''Tm3t-ḥrt'' | ''Upper of the mat'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 7 | t:T13-W12-D21:t N14-N33*N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Temat-cheret|de|Temat-cheret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|qid=Q2402466|1=Temat-cheret}}
''Tm3t-ẖrt'' | ''Lower of the mat'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 8 | G43-M8:t*Z1*Z1 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|de|Weschati-Bekati|lt=Weschati|lt_ja=Weschati|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|qid=Q1339483|1=Weschati-Bekati}}
''Wš3tj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 9 | D58-D28:t*Z4 N14-N33 | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|de|Weschati-Bekati|lt=Bekati|lt_ja=Bekati|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|qid=Q1339483|1=Weschati-Bekati}}
''Bk3tj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 10 | O42-p:t-N14 | {{ill|Schespet|de|Schespet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Schespet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Schespet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Schespet|qid=Q2233871|1=Schespet}}
''Šspt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 11 | D1:D36 W17:t*t N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a-chentet|de|Tepi-a-chentet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-chentet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-chentet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-chentet|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Tpj-ˁ-ḫntt'' | ''Predecessor of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 12 | W17:t*t D2 D21:t N14-N33-N33:N33 | {{ill|Chentet-heret|de|Chentet-heret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|qid=Q1070111|1=Chentet-heret}}
''Ḫntt-ḥrt'' | ''Upper of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 13 | W17:t*t W12 D21:t N14-N33:N33-N33 | {{ill|Chentet-cheret|de|Chentet-cheret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|qid=Q1070112|1=Chentet-cheret}}
''Ḫntt-ẖrt'' | ''Lower of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 14 | D21-M17-M17 W17:t*t N14-N33-N33-N33 | {{ill|Tjemes-ni-chentet|de|Tjemes-ni-chentet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|qid=Q2803584|1=Tjemes-ni-chentet}}
''Rj-ḫntt''
lies: ''Tjms-nj-ḫntt'' | ''The red of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 15 | F27-F27-T19-T19 N14 N33*N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Septi-chenwi|de|Septi-chenwi|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|qid=Q2271782|1=Septi-chenwi}}
''Sptj-ḫnwj'' | ''The two fishes'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 16 | D2-W7-P3 N14 N33*N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Heri-ab-wia|de|Heri-ab-wia|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḥrj-3b-wj3'' | ''The one (from {{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|qid=Q284009|lt=Elephantine|1=Elephantine}}) in the middle of the barque'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 17 | V17-S29-n:n:n-N14-N33*N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Seschmu|de|Seschmu|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seschmu|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seschmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seschmu|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Sšmw'' | ''Protector of the image
(of the leading gods
in the {{ill|Solar Barque|de|Sonnenbarke|lt=Barque|lt_ja=Barke|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar Barque|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar Barque|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar Barque|qid=Q636041|1=Solar barque}})'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 18 | V31:n:n:n N14-N33-N33-N33 | {{ill|Kenemu|de|Kenemu|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|qid=Q1738727|1=Kenemu}}
''Knmw'' | ''The Dark One'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 19 | D1:D36-S29-G17-D13 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a-semed-seret|de|Tepi-a-semed-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-semed-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-semed-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-semed-seret|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Tpj-ˁ-smd-srt'' | ''Predecessor of the sheep's eyebrow'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 20 | S29-m-D46 D13 E11 N14 N33 | {{ill|Semed-seret|de|Semed-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|qid=Q1621224|1=Semed-seret}}
''Smd-srt'' | ''Eyebrow of the sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 21 | S29-D21:t-F8 N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33 | {{ill|Seret (Decan)|de|Seret (Dekan)|lt=Seret|lt_ja=Seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|qid=Q2272336|1=Seret (Decan)}}
''Srt'' | ''Sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 22 | V17-G43-M17 E11 N14-N33:N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Sawi-seret|de|Sawi-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|qid=Q2228296|1=Sawi-seret}}
''S3wj-srt'' | ''Flank of the sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 23 | W12:D21-Aa1*p:D46 E11 N14-N33 | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-seret|de|Cheri-cheped-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|qid=Q1070224|1=Cheri-cheped-seret}}
''Ḫrj-ḫpd-srt'' | ''The one at the hind part of the sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 24 | D1*p:D36*Z1 G25-G25-N14-N33*N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a achui|de|Tepi-a achui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a achui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a achui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a achui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Tpj-ˁ 3ẖwj'' | ''First of the two {{ill|Ach (Egyptian mythology)|de|Ach (ägyptische Mythologie)|lt=Axes|lt_ja=Achs|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ach (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ach (Egyptian mythology)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ach (Egyptian mythology)|qid=Q2633843|1=Akh}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 25 | G25-G25-N14-N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Achui|de|Achui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''3ẖwj'' | ''The two axes'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 26 | G29-G29-G43-N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Baui|de|Baui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''B3wj'' | ''The two {{ill|Ba (Egyptian mythology)|de|Ba (ägyptische Mythologie)|lt=Bas|lt_ja=Bas|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian mythology)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian mythology)|qid=Q1129404|1=Ba (Egyptian soul)}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 27 | D19:N35-X1:X1-D2-r:X1-N14 | {{ill|Chentu-heru|de|Chentu-heru|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-heru|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-heru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-heru|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḫntt-ḥrt'' / ''Ḫntw-ḥrw'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 28 | W17-N35:X1*X1-W12-r:X1-N14:Z2 | {{ill|Chentu-cheru|de|Chentu-cheru|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-cheru|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-cheru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentu-cheru|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḫntt-ẖrt'' / ''Ḫntw-ẖrw'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 29 | Aa28-Aa28 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Qed (Deacon)|de|Qed (Dekan)|lt=Qed|lt_ja=Qed|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Deacon)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Deacon)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Deacon)|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Qd'' | ''Children (souls)'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 30 | Aa28-Aa28-E11-E11 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Sawi-qed-seret|de|Sawi-qed-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-qed-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-qed-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-qed-seret|qid=Q1402958|1=Sawi-qed-seret}}
''Qd-b3wj-srt''
lies: ''S3wj-qd-srt'' | ''Children (souls) of the sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 31 | M12-M12-M12 N14-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33-N33:N33 | {{ill|Chau (Decan)|de|Chau (Dekan)|lt=Chau|lt_ja=Chau|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|qid=Q1068317|1=Chau (Decan)}}
''ẖ3w'' | ''Thousands (?)'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 32 | D36:D21 X1:N33 N14-N33:N33 | {{ill|Iaret|de|Iaret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|qid=Q1655707|1=Iaret}}
''ˁrt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 33 | D36:Z1 D2:D21 N14-N33 | {{ill|Remen-heri|de|Remen-heri|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Rmn-ḥrj'' | ''Upper arm (of the {{ill|Sah (constellation)|de|Sah (Sternbild)|lt=Sah|lt_ja=Sah|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sah (constellation)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sah (constellation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sah (constellation)|qid=Q2211961|1=Sah (constellation)}})'' |- | style="text-align:center"| 36 | R8-M44-t:N14 N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Sopdet (constellation)|de|Sopdet (Sternbild)|lt=Sopdet|lt_ja=Sopdet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|qid=Q1418302|1=Sopdet (constellation)}}
''Spdt'' | ''Sopdet'' |} == See also == * {{ill|Diagonal Star Clock EA47605|de|Diagonalsternuhr EA47605|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock EA47605|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock EA47605|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal Star Clock EA47605|qid=Q1208201|1=Diagonal star clock EA47605}} * {{ill|Coffin of Heni|de|Sarg des Heni|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coffin of Heni|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coffin of Heni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coffin of Heni|qid=Q1720616|1=Sarcophagus of Heni}} == Literature == * {{ill|Jochem Kahl|en|Jochem Kahl|qid=Q1691027|lt=Jochem Kahl|1=Jochem Kahl}}: ''Siut-Thebes: On the Appreciation of Traditions in Ancient Egypt''.
